indicators.name: Large sofa
indicators.rationale: The large sofa takes up a significant amount of space, leaving limited room for computer work.

indicators.name: Lack of dedicated workspace
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated workspace for computer work, making it difficult to focus on tasks.

indicators.name: Bright natural light
indicators.rationale: The bright natural light from the windows can help reduce eye strain during computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work due to the lack of a dedicated workspace and the large sofa taking up space, but the bright natural light can be beneficial.
